archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury - Deep Cinematic Tech
design_philosophy: Glassmorphism aesthetic emphasizing depth through z-layering, ambient underlying glows, and frosted glass cards. Avoids generic AI 'slop' gradients by utilizing deep obsidian paired with cinematic crimson and emerald ambient lights. Bilingual-ready layout (ID/EN).

typography.rules: Avoid Inter/Roboto. Use fluid typography scales. Never center-align paragraphs. Use optical alignment for buttons with icons.

glassmorphism_specs.base_card: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] rounded-2xl
glassmorphism_specs.interactive_card: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] rounded-2xl hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300
glassmorphism_specs.ambient_background: Place massive blurred colored divs (e.g., blur-[120px] opacity-20) absolutely positioned behind the glass cards to create the 'frosted over color' effect.

upload_zone.layout: Large rectangular area, generous padding (p-12), flex column, center aligned.
upload_zone.visuals: Dashed border using border-white/20. Inside: Lucide UploadCloud icon (large), followed by H3 and body text instructions.
upload_zone.interactions: drag-over state changes border to solid white/40 and background to bg-white/10. Add subtle scale animation on icon.

record_button.layout: Circular, fixed size (h-20 w-20), flex center.
record_button.visuals: Vibrant accent color background (bg-rose-600), inner shadow, white Lucide Mic icon.
record_button.interactions: Idle: subtle glow shadow. Active (recording): strong animate-ping pseudo-element behind it to signify recording, and render animated audio wave bars.

result_card.layout: Bento-style asymmetric grid (md:grid-cols-3 gap-6). Left column spanning 1 for the huge percentage score. Right column spanning 2 for breakdown.
result_card.visuals: If Human: Subtle Emerald glow from behind. If AI: Subtle Rose glow. Massive text for percentage. Progress bars for confidence breakdown.

stat_cards.layout: Grid items, p-6, flex flex-col justify-between.
stat_cards.visuals: Label on top (text-xs uppercase). Huge metric number in middle (text-4xl font-light). Trend/icon on bottom. Glassmorphic base_card styling.

history_list.visuals: List items are sleek rows (p-4), border-b border-white/5, rounded-lg hover:bg-white/5. Left: filename + date. Right: Result pill badge (Human/AI).
history_list.interactions: Group-hover effects to reveal a 'View Detail' icon on the far right.

language_toggle.layout: Fixed in header top-right. Pill shape.
language_toggle.visuals: Glassmorphic pill. Active language text is bright white, inactive is text-zinc-500. Smooth slide animation for the active indicator background.

layout_and_spacing.bento_spans: Use col-span-12 md:col-span-8 for main interactive areas, col-span-12 md:col-span-4 for sidebars/history.
layout_and_spacing.padding: Use generous padding. Containers should use p-6 or p-8. Page sections should use py-12 or py-20.

micro_animations.recording_pulse: CSS animate-ping on an absolute inset-0 rounded-full div behind the mic button.
micro_animations.result_reveal: Count-up animation for the confidence percentage.

images.description: Abstract wave of light, use as a low-opacity texture in the background (opacity-10).
Dark glowing mesh, use as a subtle overlay or hero background image.

instructions_to_main_agent: Theme: Strictly Dark Mode. Do not implement light mode.
Aesthetic: Glassmorphism. Use the 'glassmorphism_specs' strictly. Every major panel/card must be a frosted glass element over a deep, richly colored background.

Bilingual: Create a central state for language ('id' | 'en'). Use this state to render either Indonesian or English text strings across the UI. Keep it simple, no external i18n libraries required, just a dictionary object.

State Mocking: Since no ML model is provided, mock the detection process. On upload or record finish, show a 2-3 second loading state, then randomize a result (e.g., 85% AI or 92% Human) and update the history and stats.
Typography: Import 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts. Apply them in Tailwind config. Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or standard sans.

Background Depth: To make glassmorphism work, the background CANNOT be solid black. It must have depth. Use the provided media asset image as a fixed, low-opacity (10-20%) background, and place 2-3 massive absolute, blurred colored circles (e.g., bg-rose-600/20 blur-[120px]) behind the grid to create an ambient glow that shines through the glass cards.
Layout: Use a Bento Grid for the dashboard (e.g., Stats at the top, Upload/Record massive card on the left, History list on the right).
Testing: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, toggle, file drop zone, etc.) for automated testing.
Icons: Use lucide-react exclusively. No emojis.
